title: dasyphyllum floribundum
intro: Dasyphyllum floribundum, also known as the 'Prairie Rose' or 'Rosier des Prairies', is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dasyphyllum floribundum include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, treat wounds, and soothe digestive issues. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
